prompt: I transform the people in my photographs into adorable, fashion-inspired caricature sketches. They feature exaggerated, cute body language, adorable proportions, expressive hands, dramatic expressions, awkward yet graceful postures, satirical fashion sense, messy ink lines, rough watercolors, a sketchbook-like style, and illustrations cut from vintage magazines on worn beige paper. I surround the figures with handwritten English notes, arrows, amusing observations, doodles, and charming personality analyses gleaned from the photographs.
